notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Matt Chapman reaches on a fielder's choice. Rafael Devers to 3rd. Willy Adames to 2nd. Throwing error by first baseman Nick Kurtz.

notableEvents.label: Brent Rooker GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Brent Rooker grounds into a double play, pitcher Trevor McDonald to second baseman Luis Arraez to first baseman Rafael Devers. Tyler Soderstrom out at 2nd. Brent Rooker out at 1st.

notableEvents.label: Fielding error
notableEvents.detail: Willy Adames reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Zack Gelof. Rafael Devers to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Throwing error
notableEvents.detail: Willy Adames reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Zack Gelof. Rafael Devers to 3rd.

notableEvents.label: Carlos Cortes pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Carlos Cortes strikes out swinging, catcher Jesus Rodriguez to first baseman Rafael Devers.

notableEvents.label: Colby Thomas pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Colby Thomas flies out to center fielder Harrison Bader.

notableEvents.label: Jonah Heim pinch-hit
notableEvents.detail: Jonah Heim grounds out, third baseman Matt Chapman to first baseman Rafael Devers.

notableEvents.label: Willy Adames reached on error
notableEvents.detail: Willy Adames reaches on a throwing error by third baseman Zack Gelof. Rafael Devers to 3rd.
